issues.description: Action type 'PlayFromHand' is incorrect. Card text states 'Play up to 1 [Caribou]...from your trash', which requires 'PlayFromTrash' or similar action that plays from trash, not from hand.
Trigger should include cost specification. Text says 'You may trash this Character: Play up to 1 [Caribou]' — the activation cost (trashing the character) must be encoded, not just the trigger type.
